visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco supermarket aisle. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a white lace sleeveless top, holds a large green box of Bibigo frozen shrimp dumplings. She points at the box and towards the camera with an energetic and enthusiastic facial expression. Behind her, the background features towering refrigerated shelves stocked with various frozen food products under cool fluorescent lighting. (2) Following several quick jump cuts in the store, the scene transitions to a cozy indoor home environment. The same woman, now wearing a zebra-print bucket hat, sits at a wooden table next to a friend with a black headband. They are presented with a blue ceramic plate containing several golden-brown fried dumplings. The lighting is warm and domestic, with plush toys and a computer screen visible in the soft-focus background. (3) A tight close-up shot captures the woman in the zebra hat as she carefully uses her fingers to pull a long, whole pink shrimp out of a partially opened dumpling. This action highlights the specific texture and size of the filling for the viewer. The camera then cuts back to a medium shot showing both women as they gesture towards the plate and the product packaging while continuing their lively discussion. (4) The video continues with dynamic shots of the two women reacting to the food. They use expressive hand gestures and exaggerated facial expressions to convey their surprise at the price and their satisfaction with the taste. The final shots show them holding the product box together, looking directly at the camera. The editing maintains a fast pace with numerous cuts between the speakers and the food.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 宵夜下酒菜!. [Variety]: bibigo 冷凍蝦煎餃. (2) [Slogan]: 399元. [Slogan]: ↓↓↓. (3) [Variety]: 15個. (4) [Slogan]: 一個蝦煎餃 26.6元. (5) [Variety]: 哇!. (6) [Slogan]: bibigo 冷凍蝦煎餃. (7) [Variety]: 迷你蔥油餅. (8) [Variety]: 一整條蝦. (9) [Slogan]: 脆脆的皮 香香的蛋. (10) [Slogan]: 一塊要26.6元. (11) [Slogan]: oh my god 的價格. (12) [Slogan]: 52塊. (13) [Slogan]: 133元5個.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators are featured throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a white lace sleeveless top. The other woman has dark hair with a black headband and a black shirt, later appearing in a zebra-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are set in a warehouse-style supermarket with high metal shelves and glass-doored freezers. The latter part of the video takes place in a comfortable home setting, featuring a wooden table, personal decorations, and warm ambient lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins immediately, accompanied by an upbeat and bouncy electronic background music track. The speaker's pitch is notably high and the delivery is very rapid, characteristic of a promotional social media vlog style. A faint, low-frequency hum of a busy supermarket environment is present but kept at a low volume in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition in the audio track. The acoustic texture shifts as the supermarket hum is replaced by a cleaner, quieter indoor room tone. A second female voice enters the mix with a warm and friendly tone. The music continues with steady percussive beats. (3) The sound of a ceramic plate clinking on a hard surface is clearly audible as food is presented. This is immediately followed by a synchronized, high-pitched 'Whoa!' from both speakers, marking a moment of surprise. The vocal prosody becomes more dynamic with frequent laughter and pitch swings. (4) A soft rustling sound of cardboard being handled occurs as the product packaging is moved. The speakers engage in a fast-paced dialogue about the cost per unit. The background music swells slightly in volume during gaps in speech to maintain the high energy of the production. (5) The video ends with a final enthusiastic remark and a peak in the music volume. The overall audio mix is clear with high vocal presence and minimal environmental interference, signifying a high-quality post-production effort.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Home Tasting -> Price-Value Evaluation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer-focused review of Bibigo frozen shrimp dumplings sold at Costco. It aims to inform the audience about the product's price, quantity, and quality by showing both the supermarket purchase and a home taste test. The creators use a high-energy, humorous approach to engage viewers while demonstrating the product's key selling point—a whole shrimp in each dumpling—to justify its relatively high price point.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly identify the brand 'Bibigo', showcase the product packaging repeatedly, and provide a detailed review of its taste and filling, which serves as a product endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-energy performance and clear visual evidence to create a persuasive review. The combination of on-site shopping and home testing provides a complete narrative arc for a social media product showcase.
